text:
Jitonoda (ジトノーダ, Jitonōda) is the mayor of Yorknew City. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 129 

Background

Jitonoda's election campaign to become mayor of Yorknew City was 60% funded by the Mafia. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 95 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

After the Phantom Troupe's attack on the initial Underground Auction Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 73 and its subsequent rescheduling, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 10, Chapter 89 Mayor Jitonoda has the police force collaborate with the Mafia to establish a 1-kilometer radius security perimeter around the Cemetery Building. When Kurapika asks Light Nostrade about why the police are working with the Mafia, Light explains how Jitonoda's ties to the Mafia, combined with the police chief's loyalty to the mayor, make such an alliance possible. 

Greed Island arc

Following the Phantom Troupe's massacre at the Cemetery Building on the night of September 3 rd Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 97 and the conclusion of the Southernpiece Auction, a newscaster reports about how Jitonoda attempted to assure auction-goers that Yorknew City would be safe for the annual auction, claiming the terrorists had been killed. However, despite the mayor's efforts, attendance ultimately dropped by 60% compared to previous years. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In the Viz translation of the manga, Jitonoda's name is omitted. 

Anime and Manga Differences

Jitonoda's name is only given in the manga, as the news report in Chapter 129 where their name is mentioned is excluded in both the 1999 and 2011 anime adaptations. The 1999 anime adaptation further excludes any mention of the mayor whatsoever when Light Nostrade tells Kurapika about the mayor's connections with the Mafia and influence over the police force.
